series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains documents created and received during the administrative hearing process in compliance with Chapter 119. of the Revised Code. Files may include notices of opportunity for hearing, hearing requests, hearing scheduling letters, hearing examiner reports of recommendation, final orders, and other correspondence and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: all administrative appeals have been exhausted, one year. ; Electronic: all administrative appeals have been exhausted, one year
